tagline: Graph-powered long-term memory for AI agents
one_sentence_purpose: An OpenClaw plugin that stores and recalls agent memory in Neo4j using vector search, graph entity linking, and automatic capture hooks.
target_users: AI agent developers using the OpenClaw framework who need persistent, graph-structured memory with vector recall
visual_metaphors: a knowledge graph with glowing nodes and edges forming a brain-like network
memory crystals stored inside interconnected graph nodes
neural pathways branching through a graph database structure

assets_needed.desc: Wide banner on white background with interconnected graph nodes and memory recall arrows, project name in emerald green
Wide banner on dark background with glowing graph nodes and memory recall arrows, project name in emerald green
Square logo on white background with abstract graph node cluster in green and blue
Square logo on dark background with glowing graph node cluster in green and blue
GitHub social preview card with tagline, abstract graph network, green and blue palette
